paper_title: WizardCoder: Empowering Code Large Language Models with Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces Code Evol-Instruct, a novel instruction-fine-tuning method that evolves code instruction data by introducing heuristics such as increased constraints, adversarial code examples, and time/space complexity requirements to improve coding performance
raw_extraction.application: Code generation, programming tasks, instruction following
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing instruction-following capability and coding performance of open-source CodeLLMs through fine-tuning with increasingly complex code instructions
raw_extraction.extension: Introduces heuristic methods tailored to coding tasks, including adding new constraints, replacing common requirements with rare ones, introducing erroneous code as adversarial samples, and enforcing time/space complexity requirements
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardCoder: Empowering Code Large Language Models with Evol-Instruct
